visualizerParams.title: Singular Integer Right Triangles
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the singular triple count to use a more efficient perimeter generation and array-based tracking.

solution.explanation: Using `counts.count(1)` is faster than a generator expression. Stepping `n` by 2 ensures `m` and `n` have opposite parity from the start, avoiding the `if (m-n)%2 == 1` check inside the loop.
